source: manual disambiguation of bist_isin.json:ambiguous — resolved via public market-data providers (investing.com / marketscreener / fintables / getmidas), web-verified 2026-06-14
note: Each ticker had TWO candidate equity ISINs in bist_isin.json:ambiguous and GLEIF surfaced no equity candidate to break the tie. Each was resolved by looking up the listed common-share ISIN from public market-data providers and CONFIRMING it exactly matches one of the two MKK candidates (the loader independently re-validates shape + ISO-6166 check digit and candidate membership before writing). NB ISDMR and MANAS resolve to the HIGHER candidate; MMCAS resolves to the legacy TREGNTR (GENTAŞ) root, which is the security now trading under MMCAS. The loader (scripts/backfill_gleif.py --stage bist) writes only confirmed=true rows; a pick that conflicts with a GLEIF candidate is logged, not written.
